content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Young Physicist". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/69/A
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, which is the number of vectors. Then n lines follow, each containing three integers x, y, z representing the components of the vector.
content.outputFormat: Output 'YES' if the sum of all vectors is (0, 0, 0), otherwise output 'NO'.

solution.approach: Calculate the sum of all vectors and check if it equals (0, 0, 0).

code.Python3:
n = int(input())
sumX = sumY = sumZ = 0
for _ in range(n):
    x, y, z = map(int, input().split())
    sumX += x
    sumY += y
    sumZ += z
if sumX == 0 and sumY == 0 and sumZ == 0:
    print("YES")
else:
    print("NO")
